description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear wireless headphones, featuring a sleek black finish with gold accents on the headband and earcup joints. The earcups are large and padded, designed to comfortably envelop the ears and provide noise isolation. The headband is smoothly curved and appears to be adjustable, with metallic gold highlights adding a premium touch. On the side of the earcup, a prominent gold 'b' logo is visible, indicating the Beats by Dre brand, along with the word 'wireless' on the headband. The headphones are likely constructed from a combination of plastic, synthetic leather, and metal for durability and comfort. These headphones are typically used for personal audio listening in urban environments, such as on the street, in parks, or while commuting.
description: A pair of black and gold over-ear wireless headphones with padded earcups and a curved adjustable headband, featuring the Beats by Dre logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, padded earcups and the curved headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gold 'b' logo and 'wireless' label, with the earcup and headband profile visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the earcups and the arch of the headband.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the gold 'b' logo and 'wireless' label, mirroring view 1.
